findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: network_lookup_dns · Private data: network_lookup_dns · Public sink: network_lookup_dns.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: network_lookup_dns · Private data: network_lookup_dns · Public sink: network_lookup_dns

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
